content: My first lead-author paper of my PhD, DIRECT, is now on arXiv! See our release [here](https://x.com/_jadelynn/status/2065119077467902215).
Started sourcing early-stage startups and conducting due diligence for Pear VC.
I was awarded the NSF Graduate Research Fellowship and the Stanford EDGE Fellowship.
Started my internship building AI features at Rippling, supported by the Kleiner Perkins Fellow Program.
